aggregateObjective: Set up and trigger a tagged v0.1 all-platform desktop release build for Zorid.

goals.objective: Configure desktop package metadata and cross-platform Electron Builder targets.
verification: electron-builder config includes macOS, Windows, and Linux targets

goals.objective: Add GitHub Actions workflow for quality-gated desktop release artifacts and draft GitHub Releases.
verification: workflow has quality, platform build, and draft release jobs
workflow triggers on v* tags and manual dispatch

goals.objective: Document release behavior and required secrets.
verification: desktop development documentation describes CI release builds and artifact targets

goals.objective: Set GitHub secrets from local Apple signing and notarization files.
verification: gh secret list shows required secret names

goals.objective: Verify, commit, push, tag v0.1, and trigger the all-platform build.
